title: viburnum coriaceum var. coriaceum
intro: Viburnum coriaceum var. coriaceum, also known as the wrinkled viburnum, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, with its leaves, bark, and roots possessing anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viburnum coriaceum var. coriaceum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
